nodes.name: .understandignore
nodes.summary: Ignore-pattern manifest for the understand-anything analysis tooling, listing files and directories excluded from knowledge-graph scanning.

nodes.name: worker-entrypoint.sh
nodes.summary: Container entrypoint that gates worker startup on HelixDB (HTTP) and the iii engine (WS) readiness, bootstraps Helix indexes idempotently, then launches the UniMind write-pipeline worker.
nodes.languageNotes: POSIX sh readiness gate using curl/nc polling loops to substitute for an absent depends_on healthcheck on the Helix image.

nodes.name: worker.Dockerfile
nodes.summary: Single-stage Node 24 Alpine image that installs dependencies, copies the source tree, and runs the UniMind iii worker (write pipeline plus maintenance crons) via the readiness-gated entrypoint.
nodes.languageNotes: Adds curl/busybox-nc for the entrypoint readiness gate; uses npm ci against a committed lockfile for reproducible builds.

nodes.name: request.json
nodes.summary: Sample ingest request payload illustrating the parameters/query/request_type shape expected by the UniMind memory ingestion pipeline.

nodes.name: FINDINGS.md
nodes.summary: Experiment write-up concluding that the embedding-based drift gate fails structurally, and recommending a cheap LLM shift-classifier instead, with method, results, and repro steps across seven sections.

nodes.name: extract.ts
nodes.summary: Experiment harness that walks Claude project session transcripts, extracts non-meta user prompt text from JSONL content blocks, and writes a chronologically sorted dataset used to evaluate the drift gate.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses synchronous fs APIs (readFileSync/readdirSync) to parse JSONL transcripts line-by-line into prompt records.

nodes.name: textFromContent
nodes.summary: Normalizes a message content value (string or array of typed blocks) into a single concatenated plain-text string, filtering to text blocks.

nodes.name: extractFile
nodes.summary: Parses a single JSONL transcript file, extracting trimmed non-meta user prompts into a list of prompt records for the project.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Entry routine that enumerates project session directories, extracts prompts from each transcript, sorts sessions chronologically, and writes the consolidated dataset to disk with a summary log.
